body_transformation: Magmar's muscular build retains its upright bipedal silhouette, now clad in deep violet obsidian skin with faint crimson mist swirling beneath its translucent surface. The yellow limb accents transform into pale silver energy trails that pulse gently along its arms and legs. Its pointed ears become hollow, wispy extensions of ghostly white mist, while the curled tail tip dissolves into a tattered, shadowy vapor trailing behind it. The flame on its tail tip is replaced by a swirling vortex of crimson mist within its hollow eye sockets.
signature_feature: Tail: tattered shadowy vapor with crimson mist eddies and ghostly white energy ripples.
